last_report: NBA official injury PDF available (22 teams) — full confidence rules apply. Pace data present but noted as secondary given universal values; O/U markets unavailable across the slate so totals not evaluated. Two picks drafted: Boston Celtics -10.0 spread (strong L15 edge + Toronto franchise player absent) and Houston Rockets ML (road upset value vs tanking Warriors with Steph Curry GTD and massive L15 gap). Three anomaly/anomaly-adjacent games flagged: OKC-Utah (-23 spread), CLE-IND (dual franchise absences distorting line), and LAL-DAL (both teams gutted, DAL tank below 2.20 threshold). Slate quality moderate — many games feature tanker matchups or extreme ML odds outside target range.

rejected_games.reason: BKN ML 1.64 below 1.70 floor; spread -3.5 at 1.92 borderline but both teams are confirmed tankers (BKN 18-59 L10:1-9, WAS 17-60 L10:1-9). WAS missing all franchise players (confirmed). BKN L15: -38.8, WAS L15: -35.2 — minimal gap (3.6 pts, below 4.0 threshold). No reliable edge; tanker vs tanker matchup is unpredictable. No pick.

PHX ML 1.22 outside range; CHI ML 4.40 outside range (no edge justifying it). CHI L10: 2-8, PHX L10: 3-7 — both cold teams. CHI L15: -53.7 catastrophic. PHX L15: +14.2 positive but PHX ML 1.22 not bettable. Spread: CHI +10.0 at 1.94 — CHI is terrible (L15: -53.7, NetRtg -5.3) but PHX also cold (L10 3-7, L2 skid). PHX covering -10 vs a team in their building is uncertain; PHX trend negative. No strong edge. Reject.

MIL missing Giannis Antetokounmpo (OUT - franchise player). Without Giannis, MIL (30-47, L10: 2-8) is a tank-tier team. MEM ML 2.88 is in range but MEM (25-52, L10: 2-8, L15: -48.9) is also confirmed tank-tier with multiple key absences. MIL L15: -43.2, MEM L15: -48.9 — negligible gap. No franchise player on either side. Tanker vs tanker with no edge. Reject.

LINE ANOMALY: CLE ML 1.08, spread -16.0. CLE missing both franchise bigs (Jarrett Allen OUT, Evan Mobley OUT — confirmed NBA PDF). Indiana also severely depleted (Haliburton OUT, Nembhard OUT, McConnell OUT, Nesmith OUT). CLE ML 1.08 far outside range. Spread -16 is anomaly-tier given CLE's dual franchise absence. IND ML 8.0 is out of range. No bettable line exists. Anomaly flagged: CLE priced at -16 despite losing both All-Star calibre bigs; IND also gutted. Deferred — monitor for line correction before tip.

MIN ML 1.78 is in range (below 1.80 by 0.02 — borderline miss). Spread: MIN -2.0 at 1.91 in range. Anthony Edwards Questionable for MIN (franchise player — GTD penalty: confidence -10, stake -20%). Jaden McDaniels also OUT. CHA (42-36, L10: 8-2, NetRtg +5.3, L15: +44.0) is surging with play-in motivation. MIN L15: -4.0 vs CHA L15: +44.0 — L15 gap strongly favours CHA (+48). MIN ML 1.78 is below the 1.80 floor. CHA ML 2.06 is in range — evaluating CHA ML: CHA is away at Target Center, MIN is home. Home court negates some edge. With Edwards GTD, the L15 gap (+48 to CHA) is significant but Edwards' potential return matters. CHA ML 2.06: EV = (0.62 × 2.06) - 1 = 0.277. Confidence estimated at ~60 base for CHA — they have road game (-2-3 pts), Edwards GTD creates uncertainty. If Edwards plays, MIN wins easily. If Edwards sits, CHA has real shot. Rule: Questionable player ~50% chance of playing — cannot build thesis on absence. Confidence drops below usable threshold with Edwards GTD risk. No pick.

rejected_games.match: New Orleans Pelicans vs Orlando Magic
rejected_games.reason: ORL ML 2.63 above 2.50 ceiling. NOP ML 1.50 below floor. Spread: NOP -5.0 at 1.89 — NOP (25-53, L10: 3-7, L15: -41.3) is weak despite home advantage. ORL (41-36, L10: 3-7, L15: -31.8) also cold. Both teams on 3-7 L10 skids. NOP has Dejounte Murray and Trey Murphy III both Questionable. No clear edge; both teams in cold form. NOP spread confidence insufficient without reliable star availability. Reject.

rejected_games.match: Oklahoma City Thunder vs Utah Jazz
rejected_games.reason: LINE ANOMALY: OKC ML 1.03 far outside range. Spread -23.0: this is anomaly-tier (tank-tier team as 23-point underdog per anomaly check rule). While OKC (61-16, L15: +37.6) vs Utah (21-57, L10: 1-9, L15: -52.2) is a genuine mismatch, -23 spread is outside normal bettable range and triggers anomaly flag. Additionally OKC near postseason clinch — star rest risk high (Thomas Sorber already OUT). Do NOT draft. Flagged.

rejected_games.match: Dallas Mavericks vs Los Angeles Lakers
rejected_games.reason: DAL ML 2.02 in range; LAL ML 1.81 in range. Spread: DAL -1.5 at 1.92. LAL missing Luka Doncic (OUT), Austin Reaves (OUT), Marcus Smart (OUT), Jarred Vanderbilt (Questionable). DAL missing Kyrie Irving (OUT), Dereck Lively II (OUT), Caleb Martin (OUT). Both teams severely depleted. DAL (24-53, L10: 2-8, confirmed tank) vs LAL (50-27 but effectively gutted). DAL L15: -37.1, LAL L15: +8.0. L15 gap: +45.1 to LAL. DAL is confirmed tanking team. LAL without Doncic+Reaves+Smart is fundamentally a different team but still likely better than DAL. Spread DAL -1.5: DAL is home but tanking; LAL depleted but L15 still positive. DAL ML 2.02: EV at conf 55 = (0.55 × 2.02) - 1 = 0.111. However DAL is confirmed tank with worst recent form. Cannot back tanker at 2.02 without strong situational reason — skills rules state tankers need odds ≥ 2.20 minimum. DAL 2.02 below that threshold for backing a tanker. LAL ML 1.81: severely depleted, cannot back. No clear edge given dual depletion and DAL tank status. Reject.

SAC ML 6.25 far above range ceiling. LAC ML 1.13 far below floor. LAC advanced stats unavailable per data feed — no spread/total analysis possible. SAC (21-57, L10: 4-6, confirmed tank) vs LAC (39-38, L10: 5-5). Without LAC stats, cannot properly evaluate. SAC L15: -29.9 confirms weakness. No bettable ML in range. Reject.
